title: Extra Additions Revamped
description: Revamped version of Extra Additions, will add numerous recipes and lots of mod compatibility!
body:
[![Kinetic Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6bf4105c8ab34a8d5e21f2126205967f9200098_0.webp)](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=1207)

### **Extra Additions Revamped** adds more recipes into the game, currently adds:

Important Information:
- Polymorph is a dependency, to use it, if you have 2 recipes with the same ingredients in the same order but a different outcome in both, click a little button above the result to switch what you get. That way you can use some of the recipes in this mod.

Recipes (View Recipes In Gallery):
- Trident Recipe
- Iron Rod Recipe
- Bell Recipe
- Stone Stick Recipe
- Glow Item Frame Recipe
- Clay to Bricks On Campfire Recipe
- Torch Recipe
- Diamond Recipe
- Diamond Nugget Recipe
- Amethyst Hammer Recipe
- Copper Hammer Recipe
- Flattened Rotten Flesh Recipe
- Leather Recipes
- Twig to Stick (Twig from Twigs mod): **ONLY FOR 1.20.1 FORGE VERSION**
- Paper from 1 and 3 Bamboo and 1 Sugarcane

Items:
- Iron Rod (Used In Trident Recipe)
- Stone Stick
- Diamond Nugget
- Amethyst Hammer
- Copper Hammer
- Flattened Rotten Flesh

Mod Compatability:
- Twigs
- Minecolonies

# !Minecolonies Needs To Be Downloaded From CurseForge!

**Extra Additions Revamped is a better version of Extra Additions, I KerbalMissile made Extra Additions and Extra Additions Revamped, but this mod is owned and published by DualFusion studios under the MIT license.**
